name: CMV-TERT
summary: CMV-TERT is normalized for the publication-integrity record noting retraction of a mouse telomerase gene-therapy lifespan paper.
mechanism_summary: Represents cytomegalovirus-vector telomerase reverse transcriptase delivery; the active public record is a retraction boundary rather than positive evidence.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: A CMV-vector TERT lifespan paper was retracted.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
